title: Foundation & Repository Scaffold - Execution Plan
overview: This phase sets up the project structure, documentation, and initial configurations. Follow each step sequentially, logging any issues to bugs.json and completing the audit report at the end.
prerequisites: Node.js and npm installed for backend.

steps.description: Create the top-level folder structure: mobile/, backend/, ml/, docs/, audits/.
actions: Use terminal commands: mkdir mobile backend ml docs audits
steps.error_handling: If mkdir fails, check permissions or use absolute paths.

steps.description: Initialize README.md with project overview, tech stack, and phase references.
actions: Create README.md with sections: ASL app description, tech stack (Flutter/Dart, MongoDB, TensorFlow/MediaPipe/Kaggle/TTS, Node.js), features, and link to AgentPlans/spec.json and phase plans.
steps.validation: README.md exists and contains required content.

steps.description: Create .gitignore for Flutter, Node.js, MongoDB artifacts.
Set up docs/ with roadmap.md and ui-ux-guidelines.md.
actions: roadmap.md: Outline project phases and milestones.
ui-ux-guidelines.md: Describe chic UI, responsive design, resting colors (e.g., soft blues), animations.
steps.validation: Docs files created with initial content.

steps.description: Initialize audits/ folders for phases 0-5 with bugs.json (empty array) and audit-report.md stubs.
actions: For each phase: mkdir audits/phase-{N}, create bugs.json as [], create audit-report.md with template.
steps.validation: All audit folders and files exist.

steps.description: Run git status and ensure repo is clean.
steps.error_handling: If mkdir fails, check permissions or use absolute paths.

steps.description: Evaluate audit report and create corrections.json.
actions: Create audits/phase-0/corrections.json with fixes for each issue.
steps.error_handling: If no issues, create empty array; ensure JSON syntax.

bug_logging: For any failures or issues in steps, append to audits/phase-0/bugs.json with id, description, severity, status, phase.
completion: Write audit report to audits/phase-0/audit-report.md summarizing validations and any open issues. Mark phase complete.
